category_sources: source_facts.description says LD_PRELOAD wrapper disables fsync and related calls; official README describes an LD_PRELOAD library that disables safe disk writes for faster test runs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libeatmydata; official GitHub README heading uses libeatmydata.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides installing, usage, performance notes, warnings, and links to the official project page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/stewartsmith/libeatmydata, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable eatmydata; official README describes disabling fsync/O_SYNC via LD_PRELOAD for faster test runs.
